retention.strategy: Keep pinned lessons first, then the most-observed and most-recent auto-learned lessons.

lessons.description: Auto-learned navigation path for Agents: chat input model picker.

steps: Open or keep the Agents app visible.
Open the model picker dropdown and keep it open.
Verify the exact model/version label is visible before capture.
Open the Agents app from the desktop taskbar or visible launcher.
If the agent list shows a selection prompt or empty state
click the first visible agent row to open its chat panel.
Confirm the ChatInputBar (chat composer) is visible at the bottom of the panel — look for the 'What do you want to create?' placeholder or the Send button.
Locate the model selector control inside the ChatInputBar — it is typically a labeled button or chip showing the currently active model name
Click the model selector to expand the model picker dropdown and keep it open.

metadata.lastStory: GPT-5.5 is now a first-class selectable model in the chat composer model picker. The ChatInputBar component and models constants were updated to include GPT-5.5 with matching benchmark pricing wired through the interface and server dev loo…
